title: mikania rugosa
intro: Mikania rugosa, also known as the hairy bittercreeper or Japanese bittercreeper, is a perennial vine native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, as well as its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and viruses. The health benefits of Mikania rugosa include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatism, and improving digestion, among others. Mikania rugosa can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is sometimes used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
